description: There are many ways that drivers can help to achieve and follow safety driving precautions and wearing awareness. Since we are in this era, many applications and games that can help us to use, not only in personal computers but in our android cell phones. It can apply to the safety driving in having an understanding precautions. Safety Driving Quiz Game App is an application that most of the Filipino’s needed today. Because of the growing number of driver’s they cannot easily know the signage that they encounter everyday on the road while driving.

ProjectHeader.title: Safety Driving Quiz Game App Project In Software Engineer Unity Game
ProjectHeader.tags: Android, Android Cell Phones, C Plus Plus, Engineer Unity Game, Precautions, Safety Driving, Signage, Unity2D

description: The main objective of the study is to design and develop a system “Computer Laboratory Monitoring and Controlling Electrical Appliances using Raspberry Pi with Fuzzy Logic”, the proponents proposed a study regarding the improvement of monitoring and controlling electrical appliances inside a computer laboratory. The system made by the proponents was a way to monitor and control the common electrical appliances inside a computer laboratory along with monitoring the load and usage of each appliance. The proponents conducted a brief interview and post-survey to gathered data to know if the devices used by the proponents can effective in terms of monitoring and controlling electrical appliances inside a computer laboratory.

ProjectHeader.title: Alq Computer Laboratory Monitoring And Controlling Electrical Appliances Using Raspberry Pi
ProjectHeader.tags: Arduino Uno, Html, Jquery, Php, Python, Raspberry Pi
